blended.narrative: Granite Peak is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 432 ft. Looking ahead, 25 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 16" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 26°F, winds around 22 mph. Expect powder.
